titleStmt.title: SII 16.77: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 77. (A.R. No. 326 of 1905.) UPPARAPALLE, PRODDATUR TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a huge pillar lying in front of the Śiva temple called Mobbuladēva�am.

There are two dates in this record. The Sanskrit portion of the inscription contains a date in chronogram Vēd-ābdhi-yuga-[bhū*], Vṛisha, Mādhava (Vaiśākha), Pūrṇimā. The composer of the verse has apparently omitted the word for the numeral 1 in the chronogram which stands for Śaka 1444 (current). The details correspond to 1521 A.D., April 21. The Telugu portion of the record contains another date Śaka 1446, Tāraṇa, Māgha ba. 14, Monday, Śivarātri, corresponding to 1525. A.D., February 20, Monday, f.d.t. °21.

The inscription records that Pedaśiṅga-mahīpāla or Pedaśiṅgama-nāyaka, son of Jūpalli Rāmā-nāyaka, having gone on a casual visit to the temple of Nāganātha and observed it in a state of ruins, undertook to have the temple renovated and so had the garbhagṛiha, ghaṁṭāvēdi, antarāḷa-maṇṭapa, raṅga-maṇṭapa, nandi-maṇṭapa, and the gōpuras of the prākāra built and a tank dug to the south of the temple. By the context of the record it seems that the former date cited above refers to the commencement of the renovation and the latter to the completion of the same. The donor, who also endowed the temple with lands for a lamp, offerings and other services to the god, for the merit of his father, is said to have held the Chernūru and Pōṭladurti-sīmas in Mulikināḍu-sthala, situated in Ghaṁḍikōṭa-sīma which was included in Udayagirirājya, as nayaṅkara under the king.

The same pillar records the gift of two copper images of the god and the goddess by Mallā-nāyaka, brother of Pedaśiṅgama-nāyaka besides a few other grants by the priests of the temple, and the masons who participated in the renovations.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[©] śubhamastu . pāyādvō gaṇanāyakaḥ paśupatē
ragrē ciraṁ saṁsthitō vāmārdhāṁgavirājitāṁ girisu
tāṁ jñātvā nijāṁ mātaraṁ . tuṁḍāgraṁ pravisā
rya sasmitamukhaḥ pītvā stanaṁ cāparaṁ pātuṁ prīta
manā stanaṁ mṛgayatē vighnāṁtakaḥ sarvadā . daṁṣṭrā
grēṇa dharā murasyabhimatāṁ lakṣmīṁ karāṁbhōru
hēṣvaṁbhōjaṁ jalajaṁ sudarśana mathō kaumōdakīṁ
dhārayan . sarvāṁgēṣu ca sa ptataṁtunivahā ssāṁ
gā ssamastāgamā npāyā dādivarāharūpa
ruciraḥ kāruṇyaratnākaraḥ . nāgājinadharaṁ nāga
nāthēśaṁ nāgabhūṣaṇaṁ . nāgāriṁ nagarājātma
jārddhaṁ nagacaraṁ bhajē . yasyārdhēṁdurmū
rdhni gaṁgā ca gaurī vāmārdhāṁgē bhāti nityāna
pāyā . pāyātsōvaḥ pārvatīśō mahēśaḥ
sadbhaktānāmāhitaiśvaryahētuḥ . śrīviṣṇuva
dasaṁbhūtajāhnavyāḥ sōdaraḥ śuciḥ . caturthava
rṇnasaṁjātō lōkē guṇagaṇōnnataḥ . tatrārṇna
vādhikō vaṁśō bahurājākaraḥ sadā . satyācā
raguṇōpētō jātō jūpallisaṁjñakaḥ . tasmiN kulē
samudbhūtō rājā rāmamahipatiḥ . tasya patnī pō
camāṁkhā pālivratyaparāyaṇā . tatputraḥ
śiṁggabhūpāla stadvikrama parāṅmukhāḥ durggasthā
Api kaṁpaṁ ttē śatravaḥ prāṇalōlupāḥ . tasyāsī ddharmanira
tā dharmapatnī guṇānvitā . dharmāṁbānāmataḥ satyavākyā
ccāryanutaprabhā . tasyāṁ śiṁggamahīpālādabhūtā mātma
saṁbhavau . tippādhipaśca rāmākhyō rūpaudāryaguṇānvitau .
tatrāgrajaḥ śiṁgamahīśasūnu stippādhipō bharggavabāhu
sāraḥ . turaṁgga māru(ṁ)hya dhṛtāstraśastrō jigāya śatrū nra
ṇaraṁgabhūmau . tasyānujaḥ sarvaguṇābhirāmaḥ pratyarththi
pṛthvīpatilōkabhīmaḥ . nijānvayāṁbhōnidhipūrṇasō
mō virājatē śiṁggamahīśarāmaḥ . tasyāsīdaraviṁdasu
ṁdaramukhī maṁdasmitā māninī callāṁ
bā sahadharmmiṇī suvacanā baṁdhuvrajā(ṁ)hlādinī .
dēvabrā(ṁ)hmaṇavaṁdanārcanasadācārātmajāmōdi
nī sādhvī sajjanasaṁstutaikacaritā reṁballevaṁśōdbhavā .
tasmā drāmamahīpālā ccallāṁbāyā ssutā
strayaḥ . śuktēriva maṇiśrēṣṭhā jātā ramyaguṇānvitāḥ .
jūpalli rāmabhūpāla stribhiḥ putrairvirājatē . guṇa
trayasamāyuktaḥ pumāniva purātanaḥ . sa
rāmabhūpaḥ śiva Ēva sākṣā tsā callamāṁbā
girijāsamānā . tadātmajōyaṁ pedaśiṁgga
bhūpō virājatē skaṁda Iva dvitīyyaḥ . śiṁggakṣmā
pāladhāṭīturagakhurapuṭōdghaṭṭitakṣmātalō
dyaddhūḷīpāḷīnipītē caturudadhijalē rēṇumā
trāvaśēṣē . jātē nidrāvighātē navajalanidhibhi stō

ṣitaḥ śāṁrggadhanvā śatṛstrībāṣpapūrai ranava
rata mahādānadhārāṁbusiddhaiḥ . tasyānu
ja ściṁnnaśiṁggaḥ parākramanayānvitaḥ . śi
vapādārccanaratō rājatē jagatītalē .
satyācāraguṇānurāgakaruṇākīrtti pra
tāpō(ṁ)nnataṁ ma(ṁ)nyaṁtē cinaśiṁggabhūpa
matulaprāptaikapatnīvrataṁ . satyē dharmmata
nūbhavaṁ bhujabalē bhīmaṁ raṇē cārju
naṁ sauṁdaryē nakulaṁ tathā pravimalajñā
nē ca tasyānujaṁ . tasyānuja ścaṁḍḍaravi
pratāpō vilāsinīmānasa puṣpacāpaḥ . sa
maṁcitātmīyakulapradīpaḥ prakāśatē jū
pali mallabhūpaḥ . pedaśiṁggamahīpāla kī
rttivallī nabhōgatā . caṁdrabiṁbaphalaṁ sū
tē nakṣatrakusumāni ca . tasya śiṁggamahī
śasya śiṁggāṁbā sahadharmmiṇi . śaurē riva ma
hālakṣmīḥ śaṁkarasyēva pārvatī . karavālabhai
ravāṁkkō garvitaripusiṁhvāgaṁḍḍabhēruṁḍḍaḥ .
gaṁḍḍaragaṁḍḍapadāṁkkaḥ khaṁḍḍitagōpālamā
namadaśauryaḥ . puliyamārkkōlugaṁḍḍaḥ pra
tibhaṭarājanyakamalavētaṁḍḍaḥ . sa jayati vi
taraṇaśauṁḍḍaḥ śiṁgganṛpaḥ śatṛtimira mā
rttāṁḍḍaḥ . pedaśiṁggamahipālaḥ śauryadhairya kṣa
mānvitaḥ . pāti cernūrinagara manēkagrāma
saṁyutaṁ . kadācinnāganāthasya darśanā
rddhaṁ samāgataḥ . ślathaṁ dēvālayaṁ dṛṣṭvā nū
tanaṁ karttumutsukaḥ vēdābdhiyugasaṁkhyā
tē śālivāhanavatsarē . vṛṣasaṁvatsarē māsi For vēdābdhiyugabhūsaṁkhyātē .
mādhavē pūrṇnimātithau . śivālayaṁ saṁ
ttanōti śilāmaya mudāradhīḥ .

pitṟṟnudhṛtya kailāsavāsārddhaṁ daśa pū
ruṣāN . prāsādagarbhabhavanāgara raṁ
ggammadhyastaṁbhāḍhyamaṁṭapaśubhāya
tanaṁ śivasya . prākāragōpurayutaṁ vira
cayya tasya kailāsaśṛṁggavasatiṁ śithilī
karōti . taṭākaṁ tasya nikaṭē tanōtyabhina
vaṁ dṛḍhaṁ [.] Aihikāmuṣmikaphalasādhanaṁ
śiṁggabhūpatiḥ . © . svastiśrī jayā
bhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu
1446 Agunēṁṭi tāraṇasaṁvatsara
māgha ba 14 sō . śivarātripuṁṇyakāla
maṁdu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājapara
mēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīkṛṣṇadēvarā
yamahārāyalu vijayanagara
maṁdu vajrasiṁhvāsanāsīnulai pṛthi
virājyaṁ cēyucuṁnnu vuṁḍaṁgā
nu śrīmadvipparllāditya mahimānu
kūli karavālabhairava gaṁḍḍaragaṁḍḍa gaṁ
ḍḍabhēruṁḍḍa Udaṁḍḍapuliyamārkkō
lugaṁḍḍa kaṭakahaṁnnibbaragaṁḍḍa ha
ttumuvvuragaṁḍḍa tērāsāmaṁ ttabhā
rāmaṁḍḍalīkaragaṁḍḍa duṣṭagōpulamāna
marddana divicūrakāra raktacchatrādyanēkabi
rudapraśa stisahitulaina jūpalli rāmā
nāyaniṁgāri kumāḷlu pedaśiṁgga
manāyaniṁgāru tamaku kṛṣṇadēva
rāyamahārāyalu nāyaṁkkarā
nakuṁ bāliṁccina Udayagirirājyāna
kuṁ jelleḍi ghaṁḍḍigōṭa sīmalōni muli
kināṭi sthalamaṁddula cernnūri poṭladu
rtti sīmalu yēlucuṁnnu Ā cernnūri
ki dakṣiṇabhāgamaṁdu nāgēśvara dēvuniki
garbhagṛhaṁ ghaṁṭavēdi Aṁtarāḷamaṁṭa
pa raṁgamaṁṭapa naṁddimaṁṭapa prākā
ra gōpurālu gaṭṭiṁcci samarppiṁcci Aṁ
duku dakṣiṇabhāgamaṁdu mahātaṭāka
muṁnnu kaṭṭiṁci Ā nāgēśvaradēvaraku Akha
ṁḍḍa dīpārādhanānu trikālavai vēdyālaku
Amṛtapaḷluṁnnu gaṁdhapuṣpādyupacā
rāluṁnnu naḍacēṭaṭṭugānu cernūranu

kollivaṁpuna mrōdugu mrānicēni sthalaṁ mallā
nāyaniṁgāru samarppiṁciṁddi na 2 naitaṁ cē
nu kha 1 na 2 kritaṁ dhāta saṁvatsarāna cinaśiṁggama
nāyaniṁgāru samarppiṁciṁdi lōmaḍa stha
laṁcēnu na 5 pūrvadatti pinacervulōnu na 3 vubha
yaṁ cēnu kha 1 na 10 varimaḍi yī ceruvu
venakapāṭikiṁ dūrpu niḍudoṁpulu mallayya
gāru samarppaṇa cēsiṁdi na 2 saitaṁ kha 1 na 2 vū
rvadatti yiṁduku paḍamara na 5 tūmu mōna
lu na 1 vubhayaṁ kha 1 na 10 veraśi velivolaṁ ni
la sahā khā yī nāgēśvaruniki vaibhavaṁ cēsi
garāṇuvulaku tāḷlagaḍḍasthalaṁ kha 2 na 1ØÖ va
rimaḍi pāṭitūrppu kha 1 vubhayamun kha
5 na 1Ø Aṭuveraśi kha 8 na 1Ø yenimidi vuṭlu
tūmeḍuṁnnu yirusakṣētraṁ tathātithi
puṇyakālamaṁdu tama taṁḍriṁgāru rā
mānāyaniṁgāriki puṇyamugānu sa
hiraṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvakamugā
nu Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyigānu nidhyādyaṣṭabhō
gatēja svāmyataluṁnnu sāgivacciyyaṭṭugā
nu sarvamāṁnyamugānu trivācakaṁgānu dhā
ravōsi samarpaṇa cēsiri . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ
vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvarṣa sa
hasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
bahubhi rvasudhā dattā rājabhiḥ sagarādi[bhiḥ .]
yasya yasya yadā bhūmi stasya tasya hi ta
tphalaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu rnṛpā
ṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvānē
tānbhāvinaḥ pārthivēṁdrā nbhūyō bhūyō
yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . maṁgaḷamahā śrīśrīśrī .
nagari purōhituṁḍu Allāḍabhaṭlakoṁḍḍaṁbha
ṭlu tamaku yiccina dugganapallenu velicēnu
na 1 varimaḍi na 1 vubhayaṁ na 2 samarppaṇa cēsenu
laṁjūla mallayyaṁgāru tamaku Iccina sāvinē
ni pallenu velicēnu na 1 varimaḍi kuṁṭakiṁdanu
na 1 vubhayaṁ na 2 Iddumu sa(ṁ)marppaṇa cēsenu
kāśabhaktulu cavvābhaktuni komāruṁḍu kōṭābhaktuLines 152 to 156 are engraved at the bottom of the first face.
ḍunnu parvatabhaktuni komāruṁḍu cinavīrābha
ktuṁḍunnu nāgēśvaruni guḍi śikharaṁ maṁḍḍapaṁ
mōdalugānu kaṭṭi nāgēśvaruniki trikālamunnu
Anaṁttālaina daṁḍālu samarppiṁcciri .
mallānāyaniṁgāru tama taṁḍriṁgāru rāmāLines 157 to 162 are engraved at the bottom of the second face.
nāyaniṁgāriki puṁṇyamugānu nāgēśvaradēva
raku tāṁmrasvarūpālu caṁdraśēkhara vigrahā
laina pārvatīparamēśvarulanu nelaśivarātri puṁṇyakā
lamaṁduna Anaṁtamaina daṁḍālu veṭi tana sēvagā
nu samarppaṇa cēsenu . śrīśrīśrī
kōṭā bhaktuṁḍu siddhavaṭaṁ cina vīrābhaktuniṁgāLines 163 to 166 are engraved at the bottom of the third face.
riki dēvuḷaṁ paripūrti cēsina nimityaṁ mallā
nāyaniṁgāru māṁnyaṁgānu sāgiṁccina
cēnu battuni kuṁṭaku Uttarāna na 4 nalutumu
pillalamaṟi rāmarāju kumāruṁḍu gaṁgaLines 167 to 172 are engraved at the bottom of the fourth face.
yya śāsanakaṁbhaṁ likhiṁcci nāgēśvaradēvuniki tripaṁ
dyalānu Anaṁttālaina daṁḍḍālu samarppiṁcenu
yī dēvara nagari panivaddanuṁḍi paripūrṇaṁ śēIṁ
cina tulpa sōmana nāgēśvaruniki daṁḍaṁ samarpi
ṁcenu .
Digital edition of SII 16.77 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
